title: Control Flow and Loops
description: Learn how to control program execution flow using conditional statements and loops in C++.
learningObjectives: Use if-else statements for decision making
Apply control flow in practical scenarios

subtopics.title: If-Else Statements
Switch Statement
For Loops
While and Do-While Loops

recommendedTools.name: C++ Shell
recommendedTools.reason: Online C++ compiler with execution visualization

glossary.definition: A statement that executes different code based on whether a condition is true or false.
A programming construct that repeats a block of code multiple times.
A single execution of a loop's body.
A statement that exits a loop immediately.
A statement that skips the current iteration and continues with the next.
A control statement that allows selection among multiple alternatives.
